Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Shoumei]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Shoumei is a competitor in a tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Shoumei is a character who Forged a Red Crystal for protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Shoumei's technique involves a collection of blood techniques intended to synergize with a Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yan Shoumei is the full name of Shoumei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yan Shoumei is the chosen of Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yan Shoumei possesses the Ancient Scale, a Divine Treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yan Shoumei possesses an Archlord weapon in her soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Shoumei was standing next to Aekin.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
